en.text: or lemma מַלְכִּיָהוּ missing dagesh, corrected to מַלְכִּיָּהוּ; (Jeremiah [38:6), from H4428 and H3050; king of (i.e. appointed by) Jah; Malkijah, the name of ten Israelites

senses.gloss_en: or lemma מַלְכִּיָהוּ missing dagesh, corrected to מַלְכִּיָּהוּ; (Jeremiah [38:6), from H4428 and H3050; king of (i.e. appointed by) Jah; Malkijah, the name of ten Israelites
